# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

# ServiceEntry for external HTTP API (e.g., payment gateway)
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-gateway.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: api.payment-gateway.com
---
# VirtualService for payment API routing
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-gateway.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /v1/payments
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-gateway.com
      weight: 100
---
# ServiceEntry for external REST API with multiple endpoints
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-geocoding-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# VirtualService for geocoding API
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-geocoding-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /maps/api/geocode
    timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
---
# ServiceEntry for external PostgreSQL database
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-database.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.5/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.5
    ports:
      tcp-postgres: 5432
---
# DestinationRule for PostgreSQL connection pooling
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: postgres.external-database.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
---
# ServiceEntry for external MongoDB cluster
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-database.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.1.10/32
  - 10.240.1.11/32
  - 10.240.1.12/32
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.1.10
    ports:
      tcp-mongo: 27017
    labels:
      role: primary
  - address: 10.240.1.11
    ports:
      tcp-mongo: 27017
    labels:
      role: secondary
  - address: 10.240.1.12
    ports:
      tcp-mongo: 27017
    labels:
      role: secondary
---
# DestinationRule for MongoDB load balancing
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: mongodb.external-database.com
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
---
# ServiceEntry for external Redis cache
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.2.20/32
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.2.20
    ports:
      tcp-redis: 6379
---
# DestinationRule for Redis connection settings
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: redis.external-cache.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 5s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# ServiceEntry for external email service (SMTP)
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-smtp-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.sendgrid.net
  ports:
  - number: 587
    name: tcp-smtp
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 465
    name: tcp-smtps
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# ServiceEntry for external S3 storage
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# VirtualService for S3 with custom timeouts
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  http:
  - timeout: 60s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
---
# ServiceEntry for external webhook callback endpoints
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-webhook-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - webhook.partner-service.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# VirtualService for webhook with retry policy
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-webhook-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - webhook.partner-service.com
  http:
  - timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 5
      perTryTimeout: 4s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: webhook.partner-service.com
---
# ServiceEntry for external Elasticsearch cluster
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external-analytics.com
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: http-elastic
    protocol: HTTP
  - number: 9300
    name: tcp-elastic
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# DestinationRule for Elasticsearch
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: elasticsearch.external-analytics.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 2
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
---
# ServiceEntry for external Kafka cluster
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka-broker-1.external-messaging.com
  - kafka-broker-2.external-messaging.com
  - kafka-broker-3.external-messaging.com
  ports:
  - number: 9092
    name: tcp-kafka
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# ServiceEntry for external OAuth provider
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-oauth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - oauth.provider.com
  - accounts.provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# VirtualService for OAuth with circuit breaking
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-oauth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - oauth.provider.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /oauth/token
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset
    route:
    - destination:
        host: oauth.provider.com
---
# DestinationRule for OAuth circuit breaking
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-oauth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: oauth.provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 10
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 1
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
# ServiceEntry for external metrics/monitoring service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-datadog-agent
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.datadoghq.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# ServiceEntry for external CDN
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-cdn
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cdn.cloudflare.com
  - "*.cloudfront.net"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# ServiceEntry for external DNS service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-dns-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - 8.8.8.8
  - 8.8.4.4
  addresses:
  - 8.8.8.8/32
  - 8.8.4.4/32
  ports:
  - number: 53
    name: udp-dns
    protocol: UDP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 8.8.8.8
  - address: 8.8.4.4
---
# ServiceEntry for external RabbitMQ
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-rabbitmq
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - rabbitmq.external-messaging.com
  ports:
  - number: 5672
    name: tcp-amqp
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 15672
    name: http-management
    protocol: HTTP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# DestinationRule for RabbitMQ
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-rabbitmq
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: rabbitmq.external-messaging.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
---
# ServiceEntry for wildcard external API services
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-wildcard
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.api.third-party.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
# ServiceEntry for external MySQL database
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.external-database.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.3.30/32
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: tcp-mysql
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.3.30
    ports:
      tcp-mysql: 3306
---
# DestinationRule for MySQL
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: mysql.external-database.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 80
        connectTimeout: 20s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 3600s
          interval: 60s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 60s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
